summary: Clear soundboard recording captures a high‑energy show highlighted by a monster Playing in the Band, soaring Sugar Magnolia and an epic Half‑Step/Not Fade Away jam.
review: The sbd source delivers crisp, well‑balanced audio with only a brief cut in Black Peter, making it very listenable. Musically the night is a standout – Jerry’s solos are on fire, Phil rides high, Bob throws tasty licks and the band rolls through a superb Playing in the Band, Sugar Magnolia and a 10‑minute Half‑Step/Not Fade Away sequence. Missing a few songs from the setlist doesn’t detract from the overall excitement.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer scores (mostly 4‑5 stars), strong praise for performance highlights and clear soundboard audio outweigh the few technical cuts.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, crisp mix with no major SQ issues; a short cut in the middle of Black Peter noted but otherwise very clean.

standout_songs: Half‑Step > Not Fade Away > Good Times Bad Times > Not Fade Away
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is jam‑heavy and tightly sequenced, second set leans more toward song‑focused playing; overall pacing feels cohesive despite a few missing tracks.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers call his solos “great”, “on fire”, “noodling blows my mind” and praise his tone throughout.
band_member_comments.Phil: Highlighted as “on fire”, “in great form”, and the star of several jams; Keith’s keyboards also get special mention.
band_member_comments.Bob: Praised for tasty licks and strong vocal delivery, though one reviewer notes a slightly annoying quasi‑falsetto on a song.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith is singled out as the star of the GSET version; no other keyboardist specifically mentioned.
